profile_backed_target.bead_source: frankenjax-mcqr.30 was in_progress and assigned to IcyGlacier; frankenjax-mcqr.30.2 was opened for this narrow residual pass.
profile_backed_target.hotspot: After pass42 LiteralBuffer, eval/add_64k_f64_vec remained slower than eval/add_64k_f64_dense_ref.
alien_graveyard_lineage: /data/projects/.scratch/no_gaps_directive.txt calls for pure safe-Rust SIMD/dense elementwise kernels with one-lever proof gates.
/data/projects/alien_cs_graveyard/alien_cs_graveyard.md identifies SIMD/tiled numeric kernels and cache-local dense layout as the relevant primitive family.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass43-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/add_64k_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

candidates.lever: Replace the current push loop in eval_same_shape_f64_map with exact-size Iterator::collect::<Option<Vec<_>>>() while preserving the malformed-tensor None fallback.
candidates.after_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass43-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/add_64k_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

candidates.lever: Specialize only Primitive::Add to remove the generic closure-shaped eval_same_shape_f64_map call while keeping identical F64Bits checks and fallback.
candidates.after_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-pass43-add-specialized-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/add_64k_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3
candidates.decision: rejected; clear regression and no same-worker confirmation warranted

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Both rejected candidates preserved the same row-major zip iteration and output push order as the current fast path.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A. Elementwise Add performs no comparisons or tie-breaking.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Both rejected candidates used the same f64::from_bits(lhs) + f64::from_bits(rhs) operation and Literal::from_f64 output encoding.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A. Elementwise Add consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.malformed_tensor_fallback: Both candidates returned Ok(None) for non-F64Bits elements in a declared-F64 tensor, preserving fallback to the generic literal path.

validation.result: empty after restoring both rejected candidates

decision.reason: Residual micro-specialization does not attack the current storage/output representation bottleneck. The next useful mcqr.30 pass should be a real dense typed storage/output lever, not a loop-shape microchange.

notes: No C BLAS, MKL, XLA, unsafe code, stash, reset, clean, or file deletion was used.
The delegated subagent for this pass failed with a usage-limit error before editing; the orchestrator used the repeatedly-apply-skill fallback and executed the pass locally.
